name: global-scheduler
description: Project-scoped task scheduler workflows, offline bootstrap, lifecycle operations, publish, migration diagnostics, and recovery guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize and operate isolated project task schedulers
interface.longDescription: Bootstrap a project-local scheduler without network access, publish and route tasks, manage lifecycle transitions, diagnose blocked work, and perform guarded migration checks.
defaultPrompt: Initialize global scheduler in this project.
Publish and route this project's scheduler tasks.
